sql_array: CREATE TABLE ftp_logs (id INT PRIMARY KEY, ftp_host VARCHAR(255), username VARCHAR(255), password VARCHAR(255), file_name VARCHAR(255), download_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO ftp_logs VALUES (2, 'ftp.openlinksw.com', 'user2', NULL, 'file2.txt', NOW());
INSERT INTO ftp_logs VALUES (3, NULL, 'user3', 'pass3', 'file3.txt', NOW());
SELECT ftp_get(ftp_host, COALESCE(username, 'default_user'), COALESCE(password, 'default_pass'), file_name, file_name) FROM ftp_logs WHERE id BETWEEN 1 AND 3;
SELECT id, ftp_host, username, file_name FROM ftp_logs WHERE ftp_get(ftp_host, username, password, file_name, file_name) IS NOT NULL AND id BETWEEN 1 AND 2;
SELECT COUNT(*), ftp_host FROM ftp_logs GROUP BY ftp_host HAVING COUNT(*) BETWEEN 1 AND 3;
SELECT ftp_get(ftp_host, username, password, file_name, file_name) AS download_result FROM ftp_logs WHERE ftp_host BETWEEN 'ftp.openlinksw.com' AND 'ftp.otherdomain.com';
CREATE TABLE users (user_id INT PRIMARY KEY, user_name VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE);
SELECT ftp_host, username FROM ftp_logs WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE user_name = 'admin' AND ftp_host IS NOT NULL) AND ftp_host BETWEEN 'ftp.openlinksw.com' AND 'ftp.openlinksw.com';
